sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3910" key="a)ldh/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλδ-ήεις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n3910.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">waxing, increasing</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:533" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">533</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
